name: Digerati Technologies, Inc.
summary: Digerati Technologies, Inc. (DTGI) operates through subsidiaries including Verve Cloud, Inc. (formerly T3 Communications, Inc.) and VerveTX (formerly Shift8 Networks, Inc.), providing cloud-based communications and telecommunications services. The company offers services under brands including Nexogy, Next Level Internet, T3 Communications, and operates under a credit agreement with significant debt obligations including Term Loan A and Term Loan C totaling over $38 million.
